description: Compute comprehensive molecular descriptors for every molecule in a library and write a per-molecule table. Columns include canonical SMILES, molecular formula, MW/ExactMW, LogP, MR, TPSA, LabuteASA, HBD/HBA, heavy-atom/heteroatom/valence-electron counts, ring counts (total/aromatic/saturated/aliphatic/heterocycle), rotatable bonds, FractionCsp3, BertzCT complexity, QED, and Lipinski / lead-like pass flags.
rules: read-only — parses molecules and writes a descriptor CSV; mutates nothing remote
INPUT may be .sdf/.mol or .smi/.smiles/.txt (one SMILES per line, no title line)
limitation: Requires the rdkit library (Python >=3.9); when absent the porter degrades gracefully and writes a stub so governance still runs offline. Molecules that fail to parse are skipped with a warning.
